subcodes.first_line: In remembrance of My leaf who hath turned toward the horizon whence shineth forth the Luminary of My Name, the Lord of Names. Verily, she hath quaffed of the Kawthar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری ورقتی التی اقبلت الی افق اشرق منه نیر اسمی مولی الاسماء انها شربت کوثر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
